name: Authentic 5-Mukhi Rudraksha
description: Certified Nepali 5-Mukhi Rudraksha, energized with Vedic mantras by Pt. Shiwanand Tiwari. Brings peace, mental clarity, and spiritual alignment.
longDescription: The Panchmukhi (5-faced) Rudraksha is a symbol of Lord Shiva in the form of Kalagni. Sourced directly from the Himalayan foothills, this bead brings immense peace, mental clarity, and spiritual alignment. It is universally considered the most widely used bead for general wellbeing.

name: 108 Beads Rudraksha Mala
description: 108+1 bead premium quality 5-Mukhi Rudraksha mala for daily japa and meditation.
longDescription: A complete mala consisting of 108 beads plus one bindu bead. Knotted in traditional red and yellow silk thread. Ideal for chanting Lord Shiva's mantras and daily wear.

name: Panchdhatu Ganesha Murti
description: Handcrafted 5-metal alloy Ganesh idol, perfect for home temples and bringing auspicious beginnings.
longDescription: A stunning, heavy-weight Ganesha idol crafted from traditional Panchdhatu (five sacred metals). Detailed etching and classic finish. Blessed by Pt. Shiwanand Tiwari before shipping.

name: Pure Sphatik Shivling
description: Natural clear quartz (Sphatik) Shivling. Highly recommended for establishing calm and pure energy in the home.
longDescription: Carved from a single piece of pure Himalayan Sphatik (quartz crystal). Worshipping a Sphatik Shivling brings harmony, peace, and spiritual growth. Comes with a brass base.

name: Complete Navratri Puja Kit
description: All 40+ essential items for your 9-day Navratri puja, including Chunri, Sindoor, Dhoop, and premium Havan Samagri.
longDescription: Save the hassle of gathering items. This comprehensive kit includes everything required for Durga Puja according to Vedic texts. Assembled with strict purity guidelines by Gurudev Ji's team.

name: Copper Shri Yantra
description: Accurately engraved Shri Yantra on a thick copper plate. The ultimate instrument for wealth and abundance.
longDescription: The Shri Yantra is the king of all yantras, representing Goddess Mahalakshmi. Placing this energized yantra in your cash box or altar invites prosperity and removes financial blockages.

name: Ceylon Yellow Sapphire (Pukhraj)
description: Unheated, untreated premium Ceylon Yellow Sapphire. Certified for astrological use.
longDescription: A stunning, eye-clean Ceylon Pukhraj gemstone. Representing the planet Jupiter (Guru), it brings wisdom, prosperity, and marital bliss. Comes with a reputed gemological laboratory certificate.

name: Premium Guggul Dhoop
description: 100% natural, chemical-free Guggul resin. Purifies the atmosphere and drives away negative energies.
longDescription: Sourced directly from indigenous trees, this pure Guggul burns slow and sweet. Used in traditional aarti and havan to cleanse the environment and elevate prayers.
